description: This pipeline reads in a model file, applies the model to input images, and saves the results. The main steps include reading in the model file, applying the model, and then saving the resulting images.

34e0965b-91da-4fd7-9fca-fdbc3eb0f9fb.name: import-weka-model-from-file
34e0965b-91da-4fd7-9fca-fdbc3eb0f9fb.description:
Imports a Trainable Weka Segmentation model from a *.model/*.arff file

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

b2ed58b3-6c0c-4b9e-82ad-1d7e8189b0e8.name: weka-classification-2d
b2ed58b3-6c0c-4b9e-82ad-1d7e8189b0e8.description:
Classifies an image with a Weka model. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the classification is applied per slice. To obtain ROI from the generated labels, utilize the 'Labels to ROI' node.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

d6efebd6-e889-43a6-9b1a-e2120e911f1a.name: generate-unique-annotation
d6efebd6-e889-43a6-9b1a-e2120e911f1a.description: Generates a unique annotation for each row based on its index. The annotations will have the format (Base name)[(row index)]
